pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and install_jasp.sh copy the dataset to this path.
verifier.py strictly enforces checking for seed value 12345 in the generated jasp project.
verifier.py checks for '0.2' and 'test'/'holdout' in the analysis configuration.

The provided dataset from JASP Data Library lacks a 'Gender' column entirely. Curled https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jasp-stats/jasp-desktop/master/Resources/Data%20Sets/Data%20Library/4.%20Regression/Big%20Five%20Personality%20Traits.csv as defined in install_jasp.sh.
These are the exact 5 column headers in the downloaded Big Five Personality Traits.csv.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions ask the agent to train an SVM predicting 'Gender' using five personality predictors from the Big Five Personality Traits dataset. The target dataset is located at '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv' and is derived from real NEO personality research data downloaded during environment setup. The task strictly requires setting the random seed to 12345 and using a 0.2 (20%) test split, with expected outputs saved to 'SVM_Gender_Analysis.jasp' and 'svm_performance_report.txt'. Critically, while the predictor variables (Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Neuroticism, Openness) exist in the data, the target variable 'Gender' is entirely missing from the downloaded dataset, making the task inherently flawed as specified.
